proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines without EGFR amplification.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines without ERBB2 amplification.

analyses.result_summary: Welch comparison: BRAF V600E lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in other lines; effect -0.5552.
Welch comparison: EGFR-amplified lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in other lines; effect -0.3486.
Welch comparison: ERBB2-amplified lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in other lines; effect -0.4321.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `kras_mutation` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than KRAS-wildtype cell lines.
The `dependency_KRAS` signal remains strong in KRAS-mutant pancreatic cell lines, where `lineage` is pancreatic and `kras_mutation` is 1.

analyses.result_summary: Welch comparison: KRAS-mutant lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 in KRAS-wildtype lines; effect -0.3075.
Subgroup comparison: KRAS-mutant pancreatic lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5591 versus -0.3103 outside that subgroup; effect -0.2488.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines without NF1 loss.
The strongest `dependency_RIT1` subgroup is `nf1_loss` equal to 1 combined with low `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` at or below 4.230.

analyses.result_summary: Welch comparison: NF1-loss lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in other lines; effect -0.0955.
Subgroup comparison: NF1-loss and low-MYC lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3761 versus -0.2633 outside the subgroup; effect -0.1128.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Colorectal cell lines (`lineage` equal to colorectal) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation` equal to 1 and high `wnt_activity_score` at or above 0.819 have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Welch comparison: colorectal lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in other lineages; effect -0.4680.
Subgroup comparison: APC-mutant high-WNT lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7311 versus -0.2530 outside the subgroup; effect -0.4781.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The complete high-dependency `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is colorectal cell lines with `apc_mutation` equal to 1, `wnt_activity_score` at or above 0.819, and `smad4_loss` equal to 0; this subgroup has much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

Within colorectal APC-mutant high-WNT cell lines, `smad4_loss` equal to 1 suppresses KIF18A dependency, making `dependency_KIF18A` less negative than in otherwise similar `smad4_loss` equal to 0 lines.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup comparison: colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT/SMAD4-intact lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2990 versus -0.2530 outside the subgroup; effect -1.0460.

Within the colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT stratum, SMAD4-loss lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2557 versus -1.2990 in SMAD4-intact lines; effect +1.0433, indicating suppression of dependency by `smad4_loss`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Colorectal APC-mutant cell lines with `wnt_activity_score` below 0.819 do not show stronger KIF18A dependency; their `dependency_KIF18A` scores are not more negative than other lines.
Colorectal APC-mutant high-WNT cell lines with `smad4_loss` equal to 1 do not show stronger KIF18A dependency; their `dependency_KIF18A` scores are not more negative than other lines.

analyses.result_summary: Negative-control subgroup comparison: colorectal/APC-mutant lines below the high-WNT cutoff had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2727 versus -0.3074 outside the subgroup; effect +0.0347, refuting stronger dependency in low-WNT lines.

Negative-control subgroup comparison: colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT/SMAD4-loss lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2557 versus -0.3074 outside the subgroup; effect +0.0517, refuting stronger dependency when SMAD4 is lost.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines in the top quartile of `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above 0.964 have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above 0.964 have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` at or above 0.964 and high `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` at or above 5.669 have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup comparison: high-growth lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928 in other lines; effect -0.1043.
Subgroup comparison: high-growth lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2816 versus -0.2447 in other lines; effect -0.0369.
Subgroup comparison: high-growth/high-MYC-expression lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297 in other lines; effect -0.0595.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `copy_number_8q24` at or above 0.428 have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.
The strongest `dependency_RPL11` subgroup combines `myc_amplification` equal to 1 with high `copy_number_8q24` at or above 0.428, producing more negative dependency scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup comparison: high-8q24-copy lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3440 versus -0.2452 in other lines; effect -0.0988.
Subgroup comparison: MYC-amplified/high-8q24-copy lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3647 versus -0.2524 outside the subgroup; effect -0.1123.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic feature-by-feature and two-feature subgroup search should recover one best-supported dependency-concentrated subgroup for each dependency outcome.

analyses.result_summary: Best BRAF subgroup: `braf_v600e` equal to 1, mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 outside; effect -0.5552.
Best EGFR subgroup: `egfr_amplification` equal to 1, mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 outside; effect -0.3486.
Best ERBB2 subgroup: `erbb2_amplification` equal to 1, mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 outside; effect -0.4321.
Best KRAS subgroup: `kras_mutation` equal to 1, mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 outside; effect -0.3075.
Best RIT1 subgroup: `nf1_loss` equal to 1 with low `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` at or below 4.230, mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3761 versus -0.2633 outside; effect -0.1128.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The systematic dependency-heterogeneity search identifies KIF18A as the clearest multivariable subgroup dependency and distinguishes it from broad proliferation-associated dependencies.

analyses.result_summary: Best KIF18A subgroup: colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT/SMAD4-intact cell lines, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2990 versus -0.2530 outside; effect -1.0460.
Best TMED10 subgroup: top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2816 versus -0.2447 outside; effect -0.0369.
Best DHX9 subgroup: high-growth/high-MYC-expression cell lines, mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297 outside; effect -0.0595.
Best POLR2A subgroup: top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928 outside; effect -0.1043.
Best RPL11 subgroup: `myc_amplification` equal to 1 with high `copy_number_8q24` at or above 0.428, mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3647 versus -0.2524 outside; effect -0.1123.
